basics.name: Shiven Sharma
basics.title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Enthusiast | Building Scalable SaaS & Intelligent Systems | ECE'29 @ SVNIT Surat
basics.summary: Passionate full-stack developer and AI enthusiast focused on creating polished, intuitive digital experiences and innovative hardware-software solutions. Currently building ShutterSync — a hardware-enabled SaaS ecosystem for photographers. Strong expertise in modern web technologies, containerization, AI agents, and embedded systems.

bullets: Architecting and developing a complete hardware-enabled SaaS platform for photographers and creators
Integrating physical hardware with scalable web applications and cloud infrastructure
Designing intuitive user interfaces and smooth user flows with React.js and modern frontend tools
Implementing backend services, authentication, and database architecture using Firebase & Supabase

experience.role: Open Source Contributor (AI Agents & Web Development)
bullets: Selected in both Open Source Contribution and AI Agent tracks
Actively contributing to real-world open source projects
Collaborating with developers across India to build production-grade solutions

education.school: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT)
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Electronics and Communication Engineering
education.highlights: Building strong foundation in electronics, embedded systems, and software development

projects.title: ESP32 WiFi NTP Smart Clock
projects.stack: ESP32, TM1637 Display, WiFi, NTP Servers, Embedded C++, Captive Portal
bullets: Developed a WiFi-synchronized digital clock using ESP32 Vroom kit and 4-digit 7-segment display
Implemented smart WiFi provisioning through a captive portal — no hard-coded credentials required
Automatically fetches accurate time from NTP servers and supports multiple timezones with DST adjustment
Credentials are securely stored in ESP32 flash memory for persistent connection
Combines embedded systems, networking, and web technologies for a seamless user experience

projects.title: Skill-Sync: AI-Powered Code Intelligence Platform
projects.stack: Amazon Bedrock (Claude 3.5 Sonnet), Titan Embeddings, RAG, Multi-Agent Architecture, TypeScript
bullets: Selected for Round 2 of AWS AI for Bharat National Hackathon
Built an adaptive AI system that explains code at different depths based on developer skill level
Implemented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over 10M+ code patterns
Designed multi-agent orchestration for code analysis, metaphor generation, and cognitive load modeling

projects.title: ShutterSync - Photographer SaaS Platform
bullets: Leading development of a complete hardware + software ecosystem for photographers
Focused on transforming complex workflows into intuitive, polished user interfaces
Implementing analytics, SEO, and user behavior tracking for data-driven improvements

projects.title: Zerodha-Inspired Stock Trading Platform
projects.stack: React, Material-UI, Chart.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT
bullets: Full-stack trading dashboard with real-time charts, portfolio management, and trading simulation
Implemented complete authentication, CRUD operations, and responsive design
Learned production-grade deployment, monorepo structure, and API integration

projects.title: Agriculture POS Web Application
projects.stack: Next.js 14, Clerk Authentication, Convex Database, TailwindCSS
bullets: Built complete Point of Sale system for seed selling platform with plans for full agriculture marketplace
Applied professional design process: design.md, wireframes, brand-aligned earthy UI/UX
Focused on production-ready practices including security and SEO

projects.title: YouTube Focus Enhancer Chrome Extension
bullets: Auto-pauses YouTube when user switches tabs and resumes on return
Improves learning efficiency by removing small workflow frictions

achievements: Selected for Round 2 — AWS AI for Bharat Hackathon (National Level)
Selected for GirlScript Summer of Code 2026 (Open Source + AI Agents)
